name: Airtable
description: Airtable is an app-building platform for creating and sharing business applications.

auth_methods.note: Airtable Web API authentication documentation states the API uses personal access tokens (sent as a Bearer token) or OAuth 2.0.

credential_access.note: Official support documentation explains how users create personal access tokens from their Airtable account (self-serve).

api_surface.note: The API reference at https://airtable.com/api is an auto-generated REST API for bases (endpoints for tables, records, attachments, fields). The Developers hub also lists SDKs and webhooks, but the primary documented surface is a comprehensive REST API.

buildability.note: Airtable provides public REST API documentation and supports authentication via self-serve personal access tokens or OAuth 2.0, so an integration can be built today.

queries: Airtable REST API docs base endpoints
How to get Airtable API key personal access token
